name: App launch and tracker selection
reason: Source-only at SP-3a Phase 5 commit. Task 5.22 (real-device verification) requires an operator with a physical Android device + connectedAndroidTest infrastructure to run this rehearsal and update this evidence file in place.

falsifiability_protocol.mutation_step: Comment out the @IntoSet line that contributes the RuTor TrackerClientFactory to the Hilt multi-binding set.
falsifiability_protocol.expected_failure: Assertion onNodeWithText("RuTor").assertIsDisplayed() fails because only RuTracker is registered.
falsifiability_protocol.expected_assertion_message_substring: Failed to assertIsDisplayed: no nodes match (text == "RuTor")

operator_run_instructions: Connect a physical Android device (USB debugging enabled, API 26+).
Expected: PASS — record screenshot of Settings → Trackers screen showing both RuTracker and RuTor listed, and RuTracker (active) after tap.
Then perform the falsifiability mutation, re-run, capture the FAILURE assertion message verbatim, revert, re-run.
Update this file: status: VERIFIED, observed_failure_message: <verbatim>, attestation_screenshot_sha256: <hash>, attestation_timestamp: <iso8601>, attestation_device: <model + Android version>.
